# chronosphere_logscale_action (Resource)

A CrowdStrike Falcon LogScale (formerly Humio) action target (email, Slack, webhook, PagerDuty, OpsGenie, VictorOps, or upload-file) invoked by a logscale_alert when it fires.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "chronosphere_logscale_action" "email" {
  repository = "default"
  name       = "Email on-call"

  email_action {
    recipients       = ["oncall@example.com"]
    subject_template = "Logscale alert: {{alert.name}}"
    body_template    = "{{query.results}}"
    attach_csv       = true
    use_proxy        = false
  }
}

resource "chronosphere_logscale_action" "pagerduty" {
  repository = "default"
  name       = "PagerDuty page"

  pager_duty_action {
    severity    = "ERROR"
    routing_key = "XXXXX"
    use_proxy   = false
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Display name of the LogScale action.
- `repository` (String) Name of the LogScale repository the action belongs to. Immutable after creation.

### Optional

- `email_action` (Block List, Max: 1) Send email when the alert triggers. Exactly one action type must be set. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--email_action))
- `humio_action` (Block List, Max: 1) Forward results to another LogScale (Humio) repository via its ingest token. Exactly one action type must be set. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--humio_action))
- `ops_genie_action` (Block List, Max: 1) Send an OpsGenie alert when the alert triggers. Exactly one action type must be set. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--ops_genie_action))
- `pager_duty_action` (Block List, Max: 1) Send a PagerDuty event when the alert triggers. Exactly one action type must be set. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--pager_duty_action))
- `slack_action` (Block List, Max: 1) Post a message to a Slack incoming webhook when the alert triggers. Exactly one action type must be set. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--slack_action))
- `slack_post_message_action` (Block List, Max: 1) Post a message to Slack channels using the Slack `chat.postMessage` API. Exactly one action type must be set. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--slack_post_message_action))
- `slug` (String) Stable identifier for the LogScale action. Generated from `name` if omitted. Immutable after creation.
- `upload_file_action` (Block List, Max: 1) Upload the query result as a file in LogScale. Exactly one action type must be set. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--upload_file_action))
- `victor_ops_action` (Block List, Max: 1) Send a VictorOps (Splunk On-Call) event when the alert triggers. Exactly one action type must be set. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--victor_ops_action))
- `webhook_action` (Block List, Max: 1) Send an HTTP or HTTPS webhook when the alert triggers. Exactly one action type must be set. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--webhook_action))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--email_action"></a>
### Nested Schema for `email_action`

Required:

- `recipients` (List of String) List of email addresses to send the message to.

Optional:

- `attach_csv` (Boolean) If `true`, attaches the query result set as a CSV file.
- `body_template` (String) Body of the email. May be templated with values from the query result.
- `subject_template` (String) Subject of the email. May be templated with values from the query result.
- `use_proxy` (Boolean) If `true`, sends the request through the configured outbound proxy.


<a id="nestedblock--humio_action"></a>
### Nested Schema for `humio_action`

Required:

- `ingest_token` (String) Ingest token for the target repository.


<a id="nestedblock--ops_genie_action"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ops_genie_action`

Required:

- `api_url` (String) OpsGenie webhook URL to send the request to.
- `ops_genie_key` (String) Key used to authenticate with OpsGenie.

Optional:

- `use_proxy` (Boolean) If `true`, sends the request through the configured outbound proxy.


<a id="nestedblock--pager_duty_action"></a>
### Nested Schema for `pager_duty_action`

Required:

- `routing_key` (String) Routing key used to authenticate with PagerDuty.
- `severity` (String) Severity attached to the PagerDuty event.

Optional:

- `use_proxy` (Boolean) If `true`, sends the request through the configured outbound proxy.


<a id="nestedblock--slack_action"></a>
### Nested Schema for `slack_action`

Required:

- `url` (String) Slack incoming webhook URL to send the request to.

Optional:

- `fields` (Map of String) Fields to include in the Slack message. Values may be templated with the query result.
- `use_proxy` (Boolean) If `true`, sends the request through the configured outbound proxy.


<a id="nestedblock--slack_post_message_action"></a>
### Nested Schema for `slack_post_message_action`

Required:

- `api_token` (String) Slack API token used to authenticate the request.
- `channels` (List of String) List of Slack channels to post the message to.

Optional:

- `fields` (Map of String) Fields to include in the Slack message. Values may be templated with the query result.
- `use_proxy` (Boolean) If `true`, sends the request through the configured outbound proxy.


<a id="nestedblock--upload_file_action"></a>
### Nested Schema for `upload_file_action`

Required:

- `file_name` (String) Name to use for the uploaded file.


<a id="nestedblock--victor_ops_action"></a>
### Nested Schema for `victor_ops_action`

Required:

- `message_type` (String) Type of the VictorOps message to send (for example, `CRITICAL`, `WARNING`, `INFO`).
- `notify_url` (String) VictorOps webhook URL to send the request to.

Optional:

- `use_proxy` (Boolean) If `true`, sends the request through the configured outbound proxy.


<a id="nestedblock--webhook_action"></a>
### Nested Schema for `webhook_action`

Required:

- `method` (String) HTTP method used for the webhook request.
- `url` (String) URL to send the HTTP or HTTPS request to.

Optional:

- `body_template` (String) Body of the request. May be templated with values from the query result.
- `headers` (Map of String) Headers to include on the HTTP or HTTPS request.
- `ignore_ssl` (Boolean) If `true`, skips SSL certificate verification for the request.
- `use_proxy` (Boolean) If `true`, sends the request through the configured outbound proxy.
